# Evaliphy LLM Index

Last updated: 2026-05-01
Primary site: https://evaliphy.com
Product: Evaliphy
Tagline: Simplify End-to-End AI Testing

## Canonical Positioning
- Evaliphy simplifies end-to-end AI testing with assertion-based workflows.
- Test AI systems like API systems: assertions, CI, human-readable reports.
- Open source, provider-agnostic, and no vendor lock-in.

## Start Here
- Product overview: https://evaliphy.com/
- Docs introduction: https://evaliphy.com/docs/introduction
- Quick start: https://evaliphy.com/docs/quick-start
- Reporting: https://evaliphy.com/docs/reporting

## Extended Reference
- Full AI-readable guide: https://evaliphy.com/llms-full.txt
- Structured metadata: https://evaliphy.com/llm.json
- Legacy summary: https://evaliphy.com/llm.txt
